pageContext.name: Vase Tom and Roly-Poly Jerry
pageContext.description: Following the launch of the acclaimed cat and mouse quirky figures and bowling figures, Soap Studio is proud to present the third installment in the series, the Vase Tom and Roly-Poly Jerry Collectible Set! The lovable duo is no stranger when it comes to accomplishing elaborate transformations, and this comically witty set is no exception!  Tom is transformed into a vase, with two cross-eyed eyes and funny eyebrows, just begging you to try to put on the same funny expression. His cocked mouth and hands on his hips seem to relay his frequent dissatisfaction with Jerry, who unsurprisingly appears to be making fun of him.  As an added bonus, Tom's vase is hollow inside, allowing you to use it as storage, where it will definitely become the most eye-catching pen holder on your desk!  Wanting in on the fun, we see Jerry has turned into a roly-poly tumbler, with a round head and cute eyes that make people feel sympathetic and playful. With his two little hands close to the body, it's impossible to not want to laugh and reach out to hold him close! When you feel troubled, just push Jerry lightly and make yourself happy with the wobble-wobble that ensues!!  This mood-enhancing set will bring fun into your collection! Collect Tom and Jerry today!
